atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 — define theme tokens (design system variables). Replaces `tailwind.config.js` theme section.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 — define custom utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 — define custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 — explicitly add a source path for content scanning.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: CSS @import — also used to import tailwindcss in v4 (`@import "tailwindcss"`).
